solutions.solution:
(C) 1st January, 2001 means 2000 complete years + 1 day of January, 2001.
Number of odd days in 2000 yrs = 0
Number of odd days in January, 2001 = 1
Total number of odd days = 0 + 1 = 1
So, the required day was Monday.

(D) 1st April, 1901 means 1900 complete years + first 3 months of 1901 + 1 day of April
Number of odd days in 1600 yrs = 0
Number of odd days in 300 yrs = 1
Number of odd days in 1900 yrs = 1

January: 3, February: 0, March: 3, April: 1
= 3 + 0 + 3 + 1 = 7 ⇒ 0 odd days
Total number of odd days till 1st April, 1901 = 0 + 1 + 0 = 1
So, the required day was Tuesday.

(C) Odd days in 1600 yrs = 0
Odd days in 300 yrs = 1
46 yrs = (11 leap year + 35 ordinary year)
= (11 × 2 + 35 × 1)
= 1 odd day
∴ Odd days in 1946 yrs = (0 + 1 + 1) = 2

Month breakdown shows odd days for each month from January to August totaling 17.
17 ÷ 7 = 7)17(2
14
3 odd days
Total odd days = 2 + 3 = 5
∴ Required day = Friday

(C) Odd days in 1600 yrs = 0
Odd days in 400 yrs = 0
5 yrs = (4 ordinary year + 1 leap year)
= (4 × 1 + 1 × 2)
= 6 odd days

Month breakdown: January: 3, February: 0, March: 3, April: 2, May: 0, Total: 8
Total odd days = 8 + 6 = 14 = 0 odd day
∴ Required day = Sunday

(C) 30th June, 1980 means 1979 complete years + 6 months of 1980
Number of odd days in 1600 yrs = 0
Number of odd days in 300 yrs = 1
Number of odd days in 79 yrs
= (19 leap yrs + 60 ordinary years)
= 19 × 2 + 60 × 1
= 38 + 60
= 98 ⇒ 0 odd days

January: 3, February: 1, March: 3, April: 2, May: 3, June: 2
Number of odd days in 1980 = 3 + 1 + 3 + 2 + 3 + 2 = 14 ⇒ 0 odd days
Total number of odd days till 30th June, 1980 = 0 + 1 + 0 = 1
So, the required day was Monday.

(C) 28th August, 2009 means 2008 complete years + First 7 months of year 2009 + 28 days of August
Number of odd days in 2000 yrs = 0
Number of odd days from 2001 yrs to 2008 yrs

Year breakdown shows odd days for years 2001-2008 totaling 10 = 7 × 1 + 3 = 3 odd days

Number of odd days in 2009:
January: 3, February: 0, March: 3, April: 2, May: 3, June: 2, July: 3, August: 0
= 3 + 0 + 3 + 2 + 3 + 2 + 3 + 0
= 16 = 7 × 2 + 2
= 2 odd days
Total number of odd days till 28th August, 2009
= 0 + 3 + 2 = 5
So, the required day is Friday.
